entries.varden_fit: Moderate-High — symptom assessment could integrate with Varden's booking flow to route patients to appropriate care
High — Swedish-specific triage could integrate directly with Varden's booking system to route patients
Moderate — similar triage logic could apply to primary care booking flow, but emergency context is different
High — care navigation is core to Varden's value proposition. Direct overlap.
HIGH - Primary care platform with AI triage. Infrastructure for care delivery.
HIGH - AI-assisted primary care. Infrastructure for scalable primary care delivery.

notes: EXPANDED - Now 6 triage/navigation platforms. Includes AI-powered triage (Livi, 98point6) and symptom checkers (Ada Health). Key capability for routing patients to appropriate care, highly relevant to Varden's navigation thesis.
